name: CLX - MGA Insurance Complaint Review v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Any authenticated session (advisor/client/admin/compliance_officer). Logs a complaint as a high/urgent priority policy_reviews row, routes to mga_principal + compliance_officer immediately. If material=true, also flags for FSRA notification (manual Phase 5; Phase 6 auto-files notice).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', policy_application_id: $json.policy_application_id, client_id: $json.client_id, advisor_id: $json.advisor_id_subject, review_type: 'complaint', trigger_source: $json.complaint_source, scheduled_date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), due_date: new Date(Date.now() + 1*86400000).toISOString().slice(0,10), priority: $json.material ? 'urgent' : 'high', status: 'scheduled', client_situation_changes: { complaint_text: $json.complaint_text, material: $json.material, source: $json.complaint_source }, video_engagement_status: 'not_sent' }) }}

={{ (() => { const rows = $input.item.json; const arr = Array.isArray(rows) ? rows : (rows && rows.email ? [rows] : []); const to = (arr[0] && arr[0].email) || 'support@crystallux.org'; const ctx = $('Carry').item.json; return JSON.stringify({ internal_secret: $env.INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET, template: 'lead-meeting-booked', to: to, vars: { first_name: 'MGA Principal / Compliance', message: 'INSURANCE COMPLAINT FILED. Material=' + (ctx.material ? 'YES (FSRA notification may be required)' : 'no') + '. Source=' + ctx.complaint_source + '. Subject advisor=' + (ctx.advisor_id_subject || 'unspecified') + '. Text: ' + ctx.complaint_text, landing_url: 'https://app.crystallux.org/insurance-mga/principal/compliance' } }); })() }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ vertical_id: 'insurance', event_type: 'complaint_filed', client_id: $('Carry').item.json.client_id, advisor_id: $('Carry').item.json.advisor_id_subject, policy_application_id: $('Carry').item.json.policy_application_id, performed_by_user_id: $('Carry').item.json.reporter_user_id, performed_by_role: $('Carry').item.json.reporter_role, event_data: { material: $('Carry').item.json.material, source: $('Carry').item.json.complaint_source, fsra_notification_required: $('Carry').item.json.material }, occurred_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ (() => { const ins = $('Create Complaint Review').item.json; const row = Array.isArray(ins) ? ins[0] : ins; return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, vertical_id: 'insurance', policy_review_id: row && row.id, priority: $('Carry').item.json.material ? 'urgent' : 'high', material: $('Carry').item.json.material, fsra_notification_pending: $('Carry').item.json.material }); })() }}
